_publications._publicationTitle: Glial-to-mesenchymal transition of tumor Schwann cells drives the genetic burden in MPNSTs from neurofibromatosis type 1 mouse model

_contextSnippet: Because of tumor size/ulceration or movement impairment, these animals require euthanasia at 13.1 ± 3.2 months
details: Fast-growing tumors required euthanasia at 13.1 ± 3.2 months due to tumor size/ulceration or movement impairment
